topic: Every house on my street does the exact same thing at the exact same minute each evening.
title: My Whole Street Moves in Sync | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every house on my street does the same thing at once.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of suburban houses at dusk with identical lit windows, low light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It happens at nine fourteen, every single evening.
scenes.image_prompt: A quiet residential street at night, streetlights glowing, deep shadow between houses, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every porch light blinks at once.
scenes.image_prompt: A line of porch lights along a dark street caught mid flicker, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then every front curtain slides shut in the same second.
scenes.image_prompt: Several front windows with curtains half drawn across a dim street, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
A hand holding a stopwatch at a dark window overlooking a street, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Door, light, curtain, all of them, exactly together.
scenes.image_prompt: A wide view of identical houses with synchronized closing doors, twilight, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knocked on my neighbor's door at nine fifteen.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark front door with a hand reaching to knock, dim porch light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No answer, but I heard the whole street breathe out.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty porch facing a silent street of darkened houses, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next night they all turned to face my window.
scenes.image_prompt: Rows of dark windows along a street seemingly oriented toward one house, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At nine fourteen tonight, my own curtain closed by itself.
scenes.image_prompt: A curtain mid slide across a window with no hand, low interior light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never set it. I never touched it.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed curtain glowing faintly from streetlight outside, dim room, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I think the street was waiting for me to join in.
scenes.image_prompt: A single lit window among a row of dark identical houses at night, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
